creator: Octavia E. Butler
description: Dana is a young college graduate who also happens to be African American and newly married to Kevin, who happens to be white. They are about to celebrate the bi-centenniel of American Independence in 1976 when she is time warped back to the antebellem South in the early 1800s where she discovers she must repeatedly save a sometimes ruthless slave-holder in order to save her family lineage and thus insure she will eventually be born.
subject: slavery
antebellum
time travel
bi-centennial
inter-racial marriage
Black history
title: Kindred
